evidence_items.summary: semantic failure, blocking supervision, missing value/outcome ledger were already observed.

evidence_items.title: OpenAI Codex MCP and Plugins
evidence_items.summary: Codex clients share host MCP configuration; plugin tools are loaded in plugin/chat context; current host refresh is a lifecycle boundary.

evidence_items.title: MCP Tools 2025-06-18
evidence_items.summary: tools.listChanged is an optional capability and notification; it does not promise host reconstruction of an existing conversation.

evidence_items.title: GitHub Immutable Releases
evidence_items.summary: immutable releases lock tags/assets; GitHub recommends draft, attach all assets, then publish.

evidence_items.title: GitHub Artifact Attestations
evidence_items.summary: Actions attest can bind binaries and SBOMs to workflow provenance.

evidence_items.title: VS Code Extension Development Host
evidence_items.summary: extensions are iterated in a separate development host and reloaded explicitly.

evidence_items.title: JetBrains Plugin Verifier
evidence_items.summary: plugin compatibility is verified against target IDE builds in CI.

evidence_items.title: release-please
evidence_items.summary: a maintained Release PR connects merged changes, changelog, version, tag and GitHub Release.

evidence_items.title: Temporal Event History and Non-Retryable Errors
evidence_items.summary: append-only event history supports recovery/audit; permanent failures should fail fast rather than retry indefinitely.

evidence_items.title: NIST SSDF
evidence_items.summary: secure software development provides a common language for supply-chain and SDLC controls.

evidence_items.title: CI/CD systematic review
evidence_items.summary: review identifies automated testing, visibility, deployment security and feedback as core continuous-practice concerns.

claims.text: 0.5.0-alpha is publicly published but not the active user generation and cannot be called delivered.
The release process has separate package, stage, host, readiness and activation truths without one enforced state machine.
The 0.5.0 readiness helper has a real composition bug that static and fake closeout tests do not catch.
Current Codex/MCP lifecycle cannot guarantee hot replacement of an existing conversation tool snapshot.
A dev profile plus explicit fresh-context validation is more realistic than attempting to mutate the stable host in place.
Long-term release reliability needs immutable artifacts, provenance, PR-driven versioning and append-only task/release evidence.

claim_evidence_chains.extracted_facts: main is a0b4ccc; public v0.5.0 exists; active is 0.4.1; target receipt is staged; native runtime is old.
claim_evidence_chains.inference: public package and delivered product are different states.
claim_evidence_chains.limitations: Desktop host refresh remains a supported user action boundary.

claim_evidence_chains.extracted_facts: different scripts own release, stage, health and simulated closeout states.
claim_evidence_chains.inference: no single enforced controller owns the complete lifecycle.
claim_evidence_chains.limitations: Some state transitions are intentionally separate; the gap is the missing canonical projection and precondition.

claim_evidence_chains.extracted_facts: dot-sourced helper param block resets Provider; parser and fake closeout still pass.
claim_evidence_chains.inference: composition regression is not covered by current gate.
claim_evidence_chains.limitations: The provider account itself was not re-authenticated in this read-only audit.

claim_evidence_chains.extracted_facts: plugin/MCP loading and development host refresh are context/window lifecycle operations; listChanged is optional.
claim_evidence_chains.inference: current conversation hot replacement cannot be a product guarantee.
claim_evidence_chains.limitations: OpenAI official正文抽取受网络错误影响，使用官方搜索摘要。

claim_evidence_chains.extracted_facts: immutable release, attestations, release PR, append-only history and non-retryable classification are established patterns.
claim_evidence_chains.inference: the project should reuse these mechanisms instead of more ad hoc scripts.
claim_evidence_chains.limitations: Temporal is a design reference, not a recommendation to add a service.

roadmap.task: 冻结 release receipt、provider readiness 和状态转换合同
roadmap.input: 当前 receipts、health、0.5.0 blocker、历史报告
roadmap.acceptance: 每个现有 blocker 都有唯一状态、证据和恢复动作

roadmap.task: 修复 readiness helper 和真实 wrapper 组合回归
roadmap.method: 移除点源参数污染，加入 PowerShell 作用域测试和真实 canary preview/apply
roadmap.acceptance: 目标 wrapper 不再出现 Provider 为空；无授权时明确 needs_user_action
不能越过 proof/readiness/user-path 直接写 delivered

roadmap.task: 建立隔离 dev profile 和 fresh-context 验证入口
roadmap.output: 最新候选可安全验证而不污染 stable
roadmap.acceptance: dev 可验证；stable active 不被覆盖

roadmap.task: 把 PR、远端构建、attestation、immutable release 和 GitHub ruleset 接起来
roadmap.method: release PR/workflow + required checks + artifact/SBOM attestation

decisions.title: 是否继续激活 0.5.0-alpha
options: 保留 staged，先修流程和目标版本
decisions.recommended_action: 保留 staged，不绕过 fresh proof/readiness。

decisions.title: 是否承诺当前 Codex 对话热更新
options: dev profile + explicit refresh + new context
decisions.recommended_action: 采用 dev/stable 双通道，不承诺当前对话热替换。
decisions.next_review: 宿主官方生命周期发生变化时

decisions.title: 是否引入 Temporal 等服务化编排平台
options: 借鉴 event history/non-retryable，不引入服务
decisions.recommended_action: 先实现本地 append-only ledger 和状态投影。
decisions.next_review: 出现跨机器、多用户、Codex 未运行仍需持续执行的硬需求时
